title: Diemisa capitata
constituents: Diemisa capitata contains various active constituents, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. These constituents are primarily found in the plant's leaves and stems. Flavonoids, in particular, have been identified as the primary active compounds in Diemisa capitata, exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The exact composition and amounts of active constituents may vary depending on the plant's growing conditions and geographic location. Further research is needed to fully elucidate the active constituents and their effects on human health.
